ACC.summary: The ACC is a Power Four league that carries 7.38% of national title equity across 1000 simulations. Members fill 9.81% of all playoff field slots — a meaningful slice of the 12-team bracket. Miami Hurricanes is a heavy favorite at 42.8% conference title odds. The next tier includes SMU Mustangs (12.9%), Louisville Cardinals (11.6%), Clemson Tigers (6.7%). Miami Hurricanes averages 9.76 wins and reaches the playoff field in 54.0% of simulations. Miami Hurricanes is the league's top national title threat at 5.33% championship odds, and the top three teams hold 86.3% of the conference's title equity. Schedules are demanding: member teams average +0.6 strength of schedule in the model. Stanford Cardinal brings up the rear at 4.20 average wins.

The next tier includes East Carolina (15.7%), South Florida (13.7%), UTSA Roadrunners (13.3%). Navy Midshipmen averages 7.69 wins and reaches the playoff field in 3.7% of simulations.
